query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A dramatic skyscape filled with layered clouds ranging from dark gray and purple storm clouds at the bottom to pink and orange-tinged cumulus higher up, with patches of bright blue sky visible between them, dominated at the center by an intensely radiant white light that extends in vertical and horizontal beams to form a cross shape.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal skyscape employing deliberately extreme overexposure at the center, where a massive cross-shaped light is blown out to pure white with clipped highlights, set against layers of pink-tinged and dark storm clouds to create a dreamlike, otherworldly vision that rejects ordinary realism.
